nasb.text: Command them to go to their masters, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, thus you shall say to your masters,

esv.text: Give them this charge for their masters: ‘Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: This is what you shall say to your masters:

cnv.text: 你要吩咐使臣對他們的王說：萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：你們要這樣對你們的王說：

ccb.text: 说，‘以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，
